# Live follow-up request

Temporary implementation note for the active follow-up pull request. Remove before merge.

Requested behavior:

- rename the root action to “Explore library” with a persistent theme-compatible highlight and hover state;
- give books without authored icon metadata a theme-colored open-book mark on cards and in the switcher;
- constrain selected note/folder highlighting to the row rather than the whole sidebar browser;
- remove the authored-content return-to-library action;
- remove the latest-preview explanatory sentence while retaining its heading; and
- keep English and Finnish labels synchronized.
